mission.title: keycloak: Use email verification instead of executing action for `send-verify-email` endpoint
mission.description:
Closes #15190

Add support for `send-verify-email` endpoint to use the `email-verification.ftl` instead of `executeActions.ftl`

Also introduce a new parameter `lifespan` to be able to override the default lifespan value (12 hours)

resolution.summary: Can we get a bump on this.  This will fix an issue we are having
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
